title: Codereview pass 2: haversine edge cases verified
description:
**Edge case analysis:**
- Identical points: a=0, sqrt(0)=0, asin(0)=0, returns 0m - CORRECT
- Antipodal points: a slightly > 1 due to FP, clamped to 1.0, asin(1)=pi/2, returns ~20015km - CORRECT
- Normal points: 0 < a < 1, no clamping needed, haversine formula works - CORRECT

**Verdict:** All edge cases handled correctly. No issues found.
close_reason: Edge case verification - haversine edge cases verified correct
